{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323204749F87B01EDEFB09E2FCF33\"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619703991162061630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"期待后续快点更新，切入点整挺好，剧情也新颖，后面不拉8分以上稳了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774102756,"group_id":"7583228658794384408","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9tR4ti3X3QJsYJK3wNYqs4/opJaEK0OD+bviOpdqEct","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776787248\u0026x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"2497730616492763","user_name":"爱吃昆山卤鸭的唐笛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2497730616492763","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583228658794384408","book_info":{"abstract":"一个21世纪的原画设计师，由于为一款“禽满四合院”的小程序游戏设计了人物画像，被神秘的四合院系统选中成为了第15001名幸运儿，穿到了四合院的影视世界，成为了轧钢厂宣传科的宣传干事，同时也住进了传说中的南锣鼓巷第96号院，成为了一帮“飞禽走兽”隔壁院的邻居，在这里他又会遇到哪些奇葩的遭遇呢？和传说中的四合院众禽又会擦出怎样的火花呢？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/375be560c2fee53982ffdd5b54ce712f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"花生豆干","author_id":"","book_id":"7583228658794384408","book_name":"四合院：我在轧钢厂的那些年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#504840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男
